feat(semantic): Add warmupEmbeddings and isModelCached functions

- Add warmupEmbeddings() for pre-loading embedding model on init
- Add isModelCached() for checking offline readiness (doctor checks)
- Return WarmupResult with success, durationMs, and error details
- Add unit tests for new exports
